description: Review fix pass: Fix 6 issues identified in 2025-06-17 review - notification bell dead-end, VPN Cores i18n gap (~30 labels), Telegram settings uncontrolled form, import backup label clarification, confirm dialog hardcoded strings, and token banner/empty-state hardcoded strings.
steps: Fix handleNotifications in AppShell.vue to navigate to 'tickets' route instead of removed 'audit-logs' tab
Add ~35 i18n keys for VPN Cores protocol field labels to i18n.ts (EN, FA, ZH) and use t() in NodesView.vue template
Wire Telegram settings form: add telegramToken/telegramChatId refs, v-model bindings, load from GET /api/panel-settings, save with PATCH /api/panel-settings
Add i18n keys for handleDeleteNode confirm dialog and use t()
Add i18n keys for token banner and empty states, use t() in template
acceptance_criteria: Notification bell navigates to tickets route
All VPN Cores form field labels use t() with proper translations in EN/FA/ZH
Telegram form has v-model bindings and functional save that calls PATCH /api/panel-settings
Import backup button shows clear 'coming soon' label
Confirm dialog for delete node uses t() translated strings
Token banner and empty states use t() translated strings
